text: I feel a subtle transition as I move from a sterile, quiet hallway outside a glass-walled room into a vibrant and stimulating exhibit. The stark clarity of the entryway gives way to the vivid, almost playful complexity of the R+D display, inviting me to reflect on the interplay between innovation and human experience. Surrounded by words and visual stimuli, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and wonder, mingled with the awareness of how environments shape thought and mood. The shift from emptiness to engagement feels both grounding and exhilarating.
